demo.name: Master Combat Repair Kit
description: An improved repair kit designed for work under fire.
Includes tools, materials, and strong spirits - for cleaning wounds and steadying the hands of those making repairs at the worst possible moment.
comment: We will make our repairs and carry on.

demo.name: Combat Repair Kit
description: Everything needed to patch up a ship and keep fighting.
Includes tools, materials, and strong spirits - for cleaning wounds and steadying the hands of those making repairs at the worst possible moment.
comment: Just because it's full of holes doesn't mean it's worthless.

demo.name: Repair Kit
description: A repair kit for work done outside of combat.
Effective only when you're not under enemy fire.

demo.name: Gunroom Grog
description: Rum and whiskey cut with cayenne pepper.
Burns hard, keeps the blood moving, and pushes men through moments better left unremembered.

EA0_10.name: Hard Grog
description: A fortified ration of grog, blended with brandy and lime.
Issues to help the crew withstand hardship, scurvy and remain at their posts under fire.

EA0_10.name: Deadeye Grog
description: A sharp blend of rum, madeira, and strong coffee.
Clears the head, steadies the eye, and keeps the sights true when it matters most.
